---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    css: styles/styles.css
listing:
  id: recent-post
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 5
---

<div class="banner-crop">
  <img src="assets/images/MansourProfile.jpg">
</div>

# [Mansour Abdoli](https://manabdoli.github.io)
This portfolio showcases my work on development of practical tools that I use in teaching statistics and applying it to research. My focus is on transparency, reproducibility, and automation.

## Recent Posts
::: {#recent-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](posts.qmd)
